## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test or fixture
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Manual CLI check, if relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated, if relevant

## Security Notes

Does this change affect generated Skill behavior, tool permissions, scripts, or registry trust?

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and reviewable.
- [ ] New behavior has tests or fixtures.
- [ ] Generated examples contain no real secrets or private data.
- [ ] User-facing errors are actionable.
